title: Basic CRUD — Product API
description:
### Your Task

Build a complete REST API for managing Products.

### Requirements

- Create a `Product` entity with fields: `id` (Long, auto-generated), `name` (String), `description` (String), `price` (Double), `quantity` (Integer)
- Create a `ProductRepository` extending `JpaRepository`
- Create a `ProductController` at `/api/products` with these endpoints:

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/products` → Return all products (200 OK)
- `GET /api/products/{id}` → Return product by ID (200 OK, or 404 if not found)
- `POST /api/products` → Create product, return it (201 Created)
- `PUT /api/products/{id}` → Update product (200 OK, or 404 if not found)
- `DELETE /api/products/{id}` → Delete product (204 No Content, or 404 if not found)

### Key Concepts

- `@Entity`, `@Id`, `@GeneratedValue`
- `@RestController`, `@RequestMapping`
- `@GetMapping`, `@PostMapping`, `@PutMapping`, `@DeleteMapping`
- `@PathVariable`, `@RequestBody`
- `ResponseEntity` with proper HTTP status codes
hints: Use repository.findById(id) which returns Optional<Product> — handle the empty case with 404
